title: Outcome dashboard (adoptions + reuse events)
context: Success metrics need visibility. This read-only dashboard reads the outcome ledger (adoptions + reuse events) and supports the project's success metrics. It hosts no dataset content.
objective: Build a read-only outcome dashboard over the outcome ledger surfacing adoptions and verified reuse events.
acceptanceCriteria: Reads the outcome ledger (outcomes/*.json + reuse events) and surfaces adoptions and verified reuse events supporting the success metrics.
Read-only; hosts no dataset content; code MIT; CI green.
output: PR to the repo adding the outcome dashboard.
